response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with notable strengths in full-stack development, tooling, and open-source contributions. However, his lack of explicit experience with Java/Kotlin IDE internals, JVM tooling, or enterprise frameworks like Spring limits his direct fit for the role. His recent work leans heavily into TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure, which, while impressive, doesn't align closely with the JVM-centric requirements of this position.
strengths: Strong track record in full-stack development with diverse languages and frameworks
Proven ability to lead and contribute to open-source projects and developer tooling
Experience with architectural design, CI/CD, and performance optimization in large-scale systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with Java/Kotlin IDE internals or JVM tooling
No explicit mention of enterprise frameworks (e.g., Spring, Quarkus) or application server integration
Recent work heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js rather than JVM-based technologies
